Topics

Organize writing by theme.

Thoughtful editorial clusters for reading across architecture, systems practice, ML research, and leadership.

Systems Architecture

Deep structural thinking for resilient services, data flow, and operational architecture in modern systems.

The Disciplinary Value of Observability

An exploration of observability as a core engineering discipline and the mindset needed to turn signal into better outcomes.

Soft Boundaries in Distributed Systems

A practical essay on how soft boundaries help teams move faster without losing system stability.

Machine Learning

Research notes and analysis on inference systems, model strategy, and reliability in production ML.

1 articles

Modelless Data Pipelines

How to design data flow for experimentation, model evaluation, and responsible deployment without over-engineering the platform.

Thoughtful leadership perspectives for shaping engineering teams, decision frameworks, and technical culture.
